case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. PHU NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, PHU SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2011

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, PHU $13,970.56 PRINCIPAL, $1,570.30 INTEREST, $429.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,969.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
